task_completion.description: Two Firefox windows are open side-by-side.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen is visibly split, showing one Firefox browser window on the left half and another Firefox browser window on the right half.

task_completion.description: Moderator Alice joined the meeting in the left window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left Firefox window displays the Jitsi meeting interface. The user's display name is set to 'Moderator Alice', which can be seen in the participant list, chat, or on the local video tile.

task_completion.description: Citizen Bob joined the meeting in the right window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right Firefox window displays the Jitsi meeting interface. The user's display name is set to 'Citizen Bob', which can be seen in the participant list, chat, or on the local video tile.
In the right window, the 'Raise your hand' toolbar button is toggled/highlighted, or a raised hand indicator icon appears on Citizen Bob's video tile (visible in either window).

task_completion.description: Moderator Alice used moderator controls to dismiss Bob's raised hand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left window, the cursor is seen interacting with the participant list or Bob's video tile to select a 'Lower hand' action, followed by the raised hand icon disappearing from Bob's tile.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Jitsi Meet GUI in Firefox.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse movements, clicks, and navigation within the Firefox browser UI to raise and lower the hand, rather than terminal commands or scripts executing API calls.

integrity.description: The Jitsi Meet web interface is genuinely loaded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Jitsi Meet UI elements (bottom toolbar, video tiles, participant pane) are rendered properly in the browser windows, not a static image or text file.

integrity.description: The correct meeting URL was used in both windows.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bars in both windows show 'http://localhost:8080/TownHallQandA'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Meeting URL: http://localhost:8080/TownHallQandA. Left window participant: 'Moderator Alice'. Right window participant: 'Citizen Bob'. The task requires Bob to raise his hand via the right window, and Alice to dismiss it using moderator controls in the left window.
